description: Style NotePlush upper with easy-peasy slip on styling, this classic loungewear pair is great if you're colour blocking or matching with your ensemble. Wear this sockless with rolled up denims for a fun vacay or a weekend getaway! Comes with a plastic shoe horn.Product DetailsTan leather slip-ons with dark brown stitch detailingElasticated gusset connecting the vamps, above the tongueSoft footbed upper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and branded grooves at the forefootMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
